meta: Aqua HK spent HK$3,670 on Meta for just 6 schedules, a weak week after 10 the week before.
Dim Sum Library trimmed Meta to HK$1,000 and booked 3 schedules, down from 9 the prior week.
Meta stays a thin channel for both venues: 9 schedules combined against 294 GA4 bookings.
google: Aqua HK Google remains the workhorse: HK$8,997 spend and 56 booking conversions at HK$161 CPA, just outside the good band.
Dim Sum Library lifted Google spend to HK$2,438 and delivered 58 conversions, still the cheapest acquisition at HK$42 CPA.
Google now drives roughly a third of the two venues' GA4 bookings.
ga4: Aqua HK slipped to 164 bookings from 204, missing the 185 target and now 7.7 percent behind YTD.
Dim Sum Library booked 130 against a 172 target, a 24 percent miss, and is 5.7 percent behind YTD.
DSL user CVR of 11.5 percent stays strong, so the shortfall is traffic rather than conversion.
